audiences.label: Portfolio-aware market-news viewer
audiences.description: Wants to understand how a verified event reaches a portfolio.

audiences.label: Creator-claim checker
audiences.description: May want to test whether a creator's strategy claim survives robustness checks before paying for it.

angles.label: Event to portfolio
angles.description: Trace one sourced event through the assets it can affect.

angles.label: Confirmation over headline
angles.description: Show what confirms or breaks the headline interpretation.

angles.label: Test before paying
angles.description: Preview a claim-checking workflow without implying that the consumer runtime exists.
angles.unlock: Verified consumer manifest, real product media, consent and attribution receipts, and exact launch-copy approval.

hooks.label: Immediate consequence
hooks.description: Lead with one sourced portfolio consequence.

hooks.label: Wrong question
hooks.description: Replace the popular question with the decision-relevant one.

hooks.label: Number first
hooks.description: Lead with one sourced market number and align the title and thumbnail.

formats.label: YouTube flagship
formats.description: One 10-12 minute thesis with packaging and evidence gates.

formats.label: 45-90 second vertical
formats.description: Clean 9:16, first-three-second hook, burned captions, and no foreign watermark.

formats.label: Landing page
formats.description: One honest waitlist page populated only from verified fields.

formats.label: Consented email
formats.description: Email copy using the existing exact-copy approval boundary.

offers.label: Market explanation
offers.description: Trust-first market explanation with no product pitch in narration.

offers.label: Product waitlist
offers.description: The current non-transactional Apollo consumer-product waitlist.

offers.label: Claim robustness check
offers.unlock: A verified consumer manifest that supplies the capability and offer facts.

experiments.hypothesis: A sourced immediate portfolio consequence will improve three-second hold versus a scene-setting opener for portfolio-aware market-news viewers.
Creator-claim checkers will choose a clearly bounded claim-check preview over an abstract robustness-engine description.
